definition:
πανήγυρις, -εως, ἡ
 (πᾶς + ἄγυρας = ἀγορά), [in LXX: Hos.2:11(13) 9:5, Eze.46:11 (מוֹעֵד), Amo.5:21 (עֲצָרָה) * ;] 
prop., a national festal assembly in honour of a god; hence, generally, any festal assembly: Heb.12:23 (for exx. in π., see MM, xviii).†
 SYN.: ἐκκλησία (which see), συναγωγή  (AS)
